REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (367 Edinburgh St.)
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $382,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. William Bernheim for Petitioner.

Mr. Bernheim stated that no estates had been opened for the three Sons and that they all died intestate. Mr. Ferdon stated that the Public Administrator was ascerting priorty, explained the difficulties surrounding the matter, and stated that they were ready to close this estate and distribute it to the Son's three estates. The Court stated that both Counsel were going to have a roll in getting the estate distributed. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
